description.en: Replace the telemetry stub with persistent storage: create telemetry_events in Supabase (indexes, immutable write-only), validate each batch event with the existing TelemetryEvent Pydantic model, bulk-insert valid rows in one transaction, return received/stored/rejected counts — frontend unchanged, same endpoint URL.
description.es: Sustituye el stub de telemetría por almacenamiento persistente: crea telemetry_events en Supabase (índices, solo escritura inmutable), valida cada evento del batch con el modelo Pydantic TelemetryEvent existente, inserta filas válidas en bulk en una transacción, devuelve conteos received/stored/rejected — frontend sin cambios, misma URL de endpoint.

sharing.en: I just completed Company's Telemetry – Storage with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/ai-eng-telemetry-storage #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #fastapi #supabase #postgresql #telemetry
